pull.title: ci, gha: Run "SageMath prover" job on GitHub Actions
pull.body:
Solves one item in https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/issues/1392 partially.

Requested in https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/pull/1398#issuecomment-1677074743.
